summary: Richer data model for Synapse makers plus the Helm<->Synapse enrichment interchange. Synapse pushes PUBLIC maker signals; Helm returns contextual knowledge (universities, state grants, companies by geo+field). Private individuals are represented as PROJECTS, not tracked person entities, unless they are genuine public figures.
changes_from_v0_1: Stable identity: id + external_ids so a maker persists across years/events.
location{} for regional grants, clusters and local talent matching.
history[] for multi-year appearances and visible progress over time.
links[] with kind, so UIs can show icons and respect the no-Instagram-photo guardrail.
is_public_figure flag to distinguish trackable people from project-only entries.

guardrails.links: Public profile/website links only. Store Instagram as a profile URL; NEVER scrape or embed Instagram photos.
guardrails.attribution: Base data derived from the public Open Sauce exhibits page; Open Sauce is not affiliated.
guardrails.four_themes: Abundance/Progress/Stagnation/Collapse are the Divergent Futures channel lens only - never a per-maker rating.
guardrails.privacy: Only public figures are person-entities; everyone else is a project.

app_embedding._doc: How the single-file Synapse app inlines these records. Base keys are compacted and any empty optional field is dropped, so the embedded JSON for ~225 makers stays small; the UI renders only fields that are present.
app_embedding.personalization: Optional persona (visitor/exhibitor/sponsor/explore) + interests are stored only in the browser's localStorage and never transmitted; they drive the app's 'For You' recommendations and pre-seed field selection.

maker_record._doc: The core shape Synapse holds per exhibit/maker and pushes to Helm. Optional fields may be null/absent; the app renders what exists.
maker_record.name: Bay Area Droid Builders
maker_record.project: Star Wars droid builds (R2, R5, BB-8, Chopper)

history.showed: R2 and R5 units, BB-8, Chopper

enrichment_request._doc: Synapse -> Helm. Ask for contextual knowledge for a maker or a field+geo.

enrichment_response._doc: Helm -> Synapse. Contextual knowledge to attach to the maker / field, by geography and domain.
enrichment_response.notes: Cross-cutting (all fields): SBIR/America's Seed Fund, Techstars, Crowd Supply, Kickstarter, SBDC/SCORE.

field_record._doc: Opportunity map per domain (already in Synapse; unchanged shape).
field_record.ind: Industrial automation; warehouse & logistics; agtech; humanoid & service robots; defense
field_record.co: Boston Dynamics; Agility Robotics; Figure; iRobot; ABB; FANUC
field_record.spon: Drover Labs; NestWorks; Vision Miner; Seeed; Raspberry Pi

convergence_record._doc: A cross-domain combination. 'fl' lists the fields it bridges. 'p' is a colour key only (green/purple/orange/red) - NOT a maker rating.
convergence_record.i: Amateur rocket & drone teams gain a shared long-range tracking and downlink stack.
convergence_record.o: Firefly Aerospace, Space Enterprise @ Berkeley, aero grants
